creator: mdharnois@home.com
text:
running panel segfaults. The gdb trace is singularly unenlightening:

Starting program: /usr/X11R6/bin/panel 
(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...
Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x2864ece9 in strncmp () from /usr/lib/libc.so.5
(gdb) where
#0  0x2864ece9 in strncmp () from /usr/lib/libc.so.5
#1  0x0 in ?? ()

How-To-Repeat: 
===[mdharnois] /usr/home/mdharnois $ panel
